intents.text: Confirm that the Google Drive related code doesn't need changes.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: google drive 这个不用改吧

intents.text: Review the changes again to check for any potential issues.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 你再检查一下会不会有什么问题

intents.verbatim_excerpt: generate sponsor 那些也没必要改，这次只做最必要的

intents.text: Confirm whether the manifest file was also changed.
Run bun run format and then commit the changes.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: bun run format 然后提交吧
